market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Meta drops out of a major clean energy pact as its natural gas buildout accelerates
articles.description: Meta has made significant investments in natural gas over the past year. Now, it's dropping out of an industry renewable energy group.

articles.title: Crypto industry to contribute $55B to US economy in 2026: NCA study
articles.description: The research released by the organization said that crypto companies will directly or indirectly lead to 232,000 jobs across the entire US economy in 2026.

articles.title: As BitMEX exits, analysts warn crypto consolidation is accelerating
articles.description: BitMEX’s shutdown marks the end of one of crypto’s earliest derivatives exchanges as analysts point to rising regulatory costs, market concentration and the shift toward licensed trading venues.

articles.title: Anthropic updates Claude voice mode with more capable models
articles.description: Claude's new voice model will let you reschedule your meeting or draft an email.

articles.title: AegisAI, founded by former Google security execs, lands $36M to stop AI-driven spear phishing
articles.description: AegisAI co-founders developed AI agents that quickly analyze each message as a human would, paying attention to small anomalies that even the most elaborate checklist wouldn’t catch.

articles.title: Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev's X account hacked to promote token amid memecoin frenzy
articles.description: The post, now deleted, touted a token called $VLAD and falsely claimed it would be listed on Robinhood.

articles.title: Tassat wants to help smaller banks tap the trillion-dollar stablecoin boom before Wall Street lock them out
articles.description: The former Signet developer aims to launch early next year a marketplace connecting stablecoin issuers with regional lenders to manage reserves.

articles.title: Robinhood CEO’s X account hacked in apparent memecoin scam
articles.description: A hacker reportedly took over Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev’s X account to promote a fake “VLAD” memecoin, posting what appeared to be a malicious token contract address.

articles.title: Runway launches AI model router as generative media gets crowded
articles.description: The Media Router is a tool that automatically selects the best image, video, or audio generation model for a request based on whether a developer prioritizes quality, speed or cost.

articles.title: OpenAI makes ChatGPT Health available to all US users
articles.description: Users can also integrate their personal data from services like Apple Health, Function, and MyFitnessPal.

articles.title: Goldman Sachs CEO backs ‘not perfect’ CLARITY Act as vote expected soon
articles.description: Goldman chief David Solomon will support the crypto market structure bill now in Congress, even as financial companies and banks are hesitant over provisions on stablecoins.

articles.title: Coinbase's corporate customers can now accept payments from AI agents
articles.description: Rolling out this week, Coinbase Business users will be able to accept payments from AI agents, done via the x402 protocol, developed and incubated by the exchange.

articles.title: Here’s why the CLARITY Act’s ethics deal may be so hard to reach
articles.description: Both parties say they want US crypto market structure legislation, but a dispute over ethics rules and who enforces them is becoming the bill’s biggest obstacle.

articles.title: BTC treasury firm Empery Digital invests $20M in AI data center developer Cardinal Data Power
articles.description: The investment marks Empery’s latest push into AI infrastructure as the company shifts capital away from its Bitcoin treasury strategy.

articles.title: Tesla’s robotaxis are moving in reverse
articles.description: The number of paid robotaxi miles traveled fell 36% in the second quarter, despite expanding to new cities, according to Tesla's own figures.

articles.title: Meta launched a new AI optimism ad set to a song about human extinction
articles.description: David Bowie's song "Five Years," which Meta used in a supposedly inspiring advertisement, is about humans learning that they have five years left to live before the apocalypse.

articles.title: Ethereum nears market bottom against Bitcoin, though key signals remain unconfirmed: CryptoQuant
articles.description: Ether trades below its realized price while onchain indicators point to easing selling pressure and recovering demand, though a definitive cycle bottom has yet to emerge.

articles.title: Google will now let you sign in to your account with a selfie video
articles.description: The tech giant says selfie videos give users more options to sign in if they're ever locked out or don't have access to their usual phone or computer.

articles.title: The SEC settles with Coinbase over its missing Gary Gensler texts
articles.description: A new court status report reveals the agency will pay a flat fee to resolve a two-year fight over what former Chair Gary Gensler knew about Ethereum.
